column1: review
Mysore Palace is very clean, well maintained, and beautifully lit at night
The palace view at night is stunning and well organized for tourists
Too much crowd at Mysore Palace, needs better crowd management system
Auto drivers near tourist spots charge high prices from visitors
Transport between tourist spots is not frequent and needs improvement
City buses are available but not tourist-friendly and confusing routes
Chamundi Hills offers a peaceful view but transport access is difficult
Brindavan Gardens fountain show is amazing and well planned
Food near tourist spots is tasty but hygiene needs improvement
Street food stalls are affordable but cleanliness is poor
Hotels near palace are expensive compared to service quality
Tourist guides provide good historical information and are helpful
Some tourist areas lack proper signboards and directions
Parking near Mysore Palace is poorly managed and crowded
Security around tourist attractions is strong and makes tourists feel safe
Local shops sell souvenirs at high prices for tourists
Cleanliness in main tourist spots is good but surrounding areas are dirty
Public toilets near attractions are not clean and poorly maintained
Traffic congestion is high near palace during weekends
Digital ticket booking system is very helpful and saves time
Mysore Zoo is clean, well maintained, and family friendly
Chamundi Temple offers a peaceful and spiritual experience
Transport connectivity between tourist spots is weak and inconvenient
Better tourist information centers are needed across the city
Food quality in restaurants is good but pricing is inconsistent
Night view of Mysore Palace is one of the best experiences in India
Some roads near tourist spots are damaged and need repair
Tour guides should offer multilingual support for foreign tourists
Waste management system in crowded areas is not efficient
Local people are friendly and helpful towards tourists
Overcharging by taxis is a common issue in tourist areas
Lighting in some tourist spots is insufficient at night
Clean water facilities are not available in all tourist locations
Heritage sites are well preserved and full of historical value
Better crowd control is needed during festival seasons
Public transport is available but not reliable for tourists
Signboards and maps should be improved for better navigation
Overall Mysore is a beautiful, cultural, and historical destination
